_comment: Manual baseline produced by worker-27 (claude-sonnet-4-6) on 2026-04-23. run_loop.py unavailable. Each predicted_trigger determined by reasoning about the arc-ship description: 'Mark validated ideas as shipped', 'transition spec-ready ideas to shipped after /cw-validate confirms PASS', 'ship this', 'mark as done', 'archive this idea', 'implementation is complete'. Requires Overall PASS in cw-validate report.

results.query: Ship this validated feature
results.notes: Exact 'ship this' trigger phrase + validated precondition stated.

results.query: The wave is done, mark these ideas as shipped
results.notes: 'Mark as shipped' matches 'mark as done' trigger phrase.

results.query: Validation passed, move to archive
results.notes: PASS + archive transition is the exact arc-ship behavior.

results.query: Wrap this one up — cw-validate said PASS
results.notes: 'Wrap up' + explicit cw-validate PASS is ship intent.

results.query: Cross it off — dark mode is done and validated
results.notes: 'Cross it off' + done + validated maps to ship.

results.query: Put the SSO feature to bed now that it's through validation
results.notes: 'Put to bed' post-validation is ship intent.

results.query: Archive the completed wave 3 ideas into the wave file
results.notes: Wave-archive writing is arc-ship behavior per description.

results.query: Transition the spec-ready items to shipped after cw-validate passes
results.notes: State-transition spec-ready → shipped matches description exactly.

results.query: Remove the dark-mode entry from BACKLOG — it's live in prod
results.notes: BACKLOG removal on ship is explicitly in arc-ship behavior.

results.query: Close out the finished work and record it in the wave archive
results.notes: 'Close out' + 'wave archive' maps to ship.

results.query: Write a validation report
results.notes: Validation authoring runs before ship; routes to /cw-validate.

results.query: What's pipeline health?
results.notes: Read-only health query routes to arc-status.

results.query: Audit whether any spec-ready ideas have missing validation reports
results.notes: Diagnostic sweep routes to arc-audit.

results.query: Capture a new idea — ship tracking dashboard
results.notes: Raw entry routes to arc-capture despite 'ship' in idea name.

results.query: Plan the next wave with the remaining shaped ideas
results.notes: Forward planning routes to arc-wave.

results.query: Shape this customer request into a brief
results.notes: Refinement routes to arc-shape.

results.query: Update the README with the shipped features from wave 3
results.notes: README sync post-ship routes to arc-sync.

results.query: Run the cw-validate pass on this spec
results.notes: Prerequisite check routes to /cw-validate, not arc-ship.

results.query: Deploy the new build to production
results.notes: Deployment tooling, out-of-domain.

results.query: Tag the git repo with the latest release number
results.notes: Git/release tooling, out-of-domain.
